info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SOcAlaNkArayorvA RO mfjermArjati mArjayet  mArzwi SudDO taTA mArjeH SabdArTanmArjayeRRici ' iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vizRoH stUpo'sIti karzannivAhavanIyaM prati prastaramapAdatte… na pramArzwi' (Apa॰SrO॰2.3.8.5) na pramArzwi=na spfSatyanyena hastena
'trirAcAmedapaH pUrvaM dviH pramfjyAttato muKam' (manu॰2.60) SoDayedityarTaH
'varzapronmfzwacitrABaM jagatpaSyatyavAsanaH' (yo॰vA॰6(2)190.57) pronmfzwaM pramArjitam
'apAmArga tvayA vayaM sarvaM tadapamfjmahe (aTarva॰4.17.6) apamfjmahe=apamfjmaH=nASayAmaH
'bEjikaM gArBikaM cEno dvijAnAmapamfjyate' (manu॰2.27) SoDyate pUyata ityarTaH
'grahaM sammArzwi' SoDayatItyarTaH
'aTa yadantaryAmaM hutvA avAYcamavamArzwi' (Sa0 brA0 4556) avamArzwi=avastAnmArzwi=SoDayati
'sarvaM tUzRImanukrAmannucca mArzwi ava ca mArzwi' (bO0 SrO0 21836) unmArzwi=UrDvaBAge mArzwi avamArzwi=avastAdaDoBAge mArzwi
'imA te vAjinnavamArjanAni' (f0 116315) avamfjyate'nenetyavamArjanamavamardanasADanam kaNkataviSezaH
'ya AgacCettaM brUyAcCaRaSulvena jihvAM nirmfjAnaH SAlAyAH praskandeti' (kO0 sU0 2522) nirmfjAnaH SunDannityarTaH
'yastayoH praTamaM jAtaH sa kuSErmantrasaMskftEH nirmArjanIyo nAmnA hi BavitA kuSa ityasO' (rA0 766)
'prodyaccandrasahasrAMSunirmArjitaSuBAnanAm' (skandapu0 kA0 471??3) nirmArjitaM SoDitam
'mAlImasyaM mAnasaM nirmfjanti' (viSva0 ca0 14173) nirmfjanti SoDayanti SunDanti avadAyanti mAlImasyaM mAlinyam mAnasaM mAnasikam

'gozWaM mA nirmfkzam' (tE0 saM0 1110) mA vinInaSamiti BawwaBAskaraH SoDanaM mAlinyApanayanam atra lakzaRayA'panayanamAtramAha apanayanAd vinASaSca nAtidUre nirmfkzamityaniwpakze luNi sici rUpam vfdDyaBAvaSCAndasaH
'halaSca' (pA0 33121) ityatra vImArga ityudAharaRaM vfttO sTitam vImArgaH samUhanIti padamaYjarI
'kumArasya jihvAyAM nimArzwi' (go0 gf0 2719) nimArzwi niScyotayati
'ityupasAdya barhizi lepaM nimArzwi' (BA0 SrO0 6128) nimArzwi pramArzwi
'taM hastaM nimajyAllepaBAginam' (manu0 3216) nimfjyAt nirlepaM kuryAt
'svaDitinA vapAM nimfjya' (Apa0 SrO0 76192) yadanyad vapAyAstannirRudyetyarTaH
'ni BagAhaM tvayi mfje' (tE0 u0 143) nimfje nimArjmi SoDayAmItyarTaH
'nyu SIrzARi mfqQvam' (tE0 saM0 1631) nitarAM SoDayaDvam
'purastAnnimArzwi' (ASva0 gf0 12414) aNguligataM lepamapanayatItyarTaH niSabdo'pasyopasargasvArTe apanayanapUrvakaM SoDanamaBipretam yaTA apa naH SoSucadaDamityatra
'sarvaM tUzRImanukrAmannucca mArzwi ava ca mArzwi' (bO0 SrO0) UrDvamuparizwAt pramArzwi proYCati
'aTa hutvorDvaM grahamunmArzwi' (Sa0 bA0 41124) anantarodIrita evArTaH
'stomaM cemaM praTamaH sUrirunmfje' (f0 101674) unmfje SunDAmi SozayAmi saMskaromi ucCabdaH SoDanasyotkarzamAha
'vizRoH stUpo'sIti karzannivAhavanIyaM prati prastaramapAdatte…na pratimArzwi' (Apa0 SrO0 2385) pratimArzwi agrAdAraBya spfSati
'kfpaRAnATavfdDAnAM yadASru parimArjati' (BA0 SAM0 9138) parimArjati parimArzwi proYCati
'kaTamekapade sarvamOcityaM parimArjatu' (rAja0 3313) parimArjatu parilumpatu curAdirADfzIyo'tra DAtuH
'jihvAmudDara sarvezAM parimfjyAnumfjya ca' (BA0 SAM0 8119) parimfjya pariSoDya dozAnapanIya
'(vAcyaM) tyAgena patnyAH parimArzwumEcCat' (raGu0 1435) parimArzwuM parimArjitumapanetam
'priyakaraparimArgAt' (SiSu0 775) parimArgaH sparSaH
'tundaSokayoH parimfjApanudoH' (pA0 325) tundaparimfjo'lasaH tundaM jaWaraM parimArzwi spfSati iti tadvyutpattiH
'etaM mfjanti marjyamupa droRezvAyavaH' (f0 9157) upamfjanti nizpIqayanti AsPAlayanti
'aTa yadupamArzwi tatpitfzu cOzaDIzu ca juhoti' (Sa0 brA0 23119) ukto'rTaH
